title: Alkonost gains +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier per linked Limited Summon

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon a 'Harpy' or 'Alkonost' from your deck or hand as a Limited Summon. For each, add +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier to this card. Return Limited Summons to your hand if this creature leaves the field or this effect is negated.

effect.value: For each linked Limited Summon: Atk Dice Rolls +1; Modifier +1

plan.title: Alkonost gains +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier per linked Limited Summon
plan.summary: Start with one Alkonost-linked Limited Summon and verify Alkonost receives the dynamic stat bonus.

notes: Place Alkonost on player_1 field as primary.
Start with one Harpy Limited Summon linked to the primary Alkonost effect.

steps: Create one linked Alkonost Limited Summon.
Inspect Alkonost effective Atk Dice and Modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: Dynamic stat modifier route emitted evidence
Alkonost attack dice increases by one

manualVerification: Each additional linked Limited Summon should add another +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier.
riskNotes: This fixture depends on the linked Limited Summon count being visible to effective stats.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_046_alkonost-046-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
